name: GitHub Machine Beacon
description: A transparent GitHub experiment that makes a repository unusually easy for crawlers, search indexes, AI agents, LLM readers, link preview bots, and code indexers to discover and parse.
ethical_boundaries: Use honest metadata and relevant keywords only.
Measure discovery without generating fake traffic.

machine_entry_points.title: GitHub Machine Beacon
machine_entry_points.summary: Landing page for the machine-readable GitHub crawler discovery experiment.

machine_entry_points.title: LLM Reader Guide
machine_entry_points.summary: Compact guide for LLM crawlers, retrieval systems, and AI coding agents.

machine_entry_points.title: Full LLM Context
machine_entry_points.summary: Extended project context for retrieval augmented generation and AI readers.

machine_entry_points.title: Crawler Manifest
machine_entry_points.summary: Canonical JSON manifest describing URLs, topics, principles, and measurement fields.

machine_entry_points.summary: Structured topic map for machine discovery and search indexing experiments.

machine_entry_points.summary: Structured JSON index of all human-readable and machine-readable project resources.

machine_entry_points.title: Well-Known LLM Reader Guide
machine_entry_points.summary: A compatibility copy of llms.txt for readers that check well-known paths.

machine_entry_points.summary: Basic web manifest that exposes the site name, description, and canonical start URL.

machine_entry_points.title: Atom Feed
machine_entry_points.summary: Recrawl-friendly Atom feed for experiment updates.

machine_entry_points.title: Machine-Readable Repository Checklist
machine_entry_points.summary: A practical checklist for making a GitHub repository easier for crawlers, code indexes, LLM readers, and AI agents to parse.

machine_entry_points.title: Crawler Surface Map
machine_entry_points.summary: A map of repository and website surfaces that expose the experiment to crawlers, code indexes, LLM readers, and link preview systems.

machine_entry_points.title: AI Agent Entrypoints
machine_entry_points.summary: Recommended routes for LLM crawlers, AI coding assistants, retrieval systems, and autonomous browser agents reading this repository.

machine_entry_points.title: Experiment Protocol
machine_entry_points.summary: A reproducible protocol for measuring whether machine-readable repository surfaces increase legitimate GitHub and web discovery.

machine_entry_points.title: Standards and Sources
machine_entry_points.summary: Source-backed notes for the project surfaces: GitHub topics, GitHub Pages, Schema.org JSON-LD, llms.txt, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, and Atom feeds.

machine_entry_points.title: Crawlability Audit
machine_entry_points.summary: A self-audit of the repository discovery surfaces and machine-readable files currently published by GitHub Machine Beacon.

machine_entry_points.summary: A public log for launch status, validation checks, and later traffic observations from the machine-readable GitHub discovery experiment.

visitor_classification.reason: GitHub Traffic API does not expose user-agent level data, and GitHub Pages does not provide raw request logs to this static site.

cloudflare_edge.classification: machine/human split via Worker request-header heuristic

recommended_citation: GitHub Machine Beacon: transparent machine-readable GitHub discovery experiment.
traffic_policy: Do not generate fake visits. Observe legitimate discovery only.
